summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 4 CaseFlow features: Client Onboarding Wizard, Payment Requests system, and Demo Mode Clear Data. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including wizard flow, payment tabs, and admin settings.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with access_token
Backend: POST /api/clients/wizard - minimal data (first name only)
Backend: POST /api/clients/wizard - full data with services and visit
Backend: POST /api/payments/request - create payment request
Backend: GET /api/payments/requests - list payment requests
Backend: PATCH /api/payments/requests/{id} - update status to PAID
Backend: PATCH /api/payments/requests/{id} - update status to OVERDUE
Backend: PATCH /api/payments/requests/{id} - update status to CANCELLED
Backend: POST /api/demo/seed - seed demo data with payment requests
Backend: POST /api/demo/clear - clear all organization data
Backend: GET /api/payments/history - get payment history
Backend: POST /api/payments/checkout - Stripe checkout (basic package)
Backend: POST /api/payments/checkout - reject invalid package
Frontend: Navigate to Clients page and find Onboard Wizard button
Frontend: Client Wizard Step 1 - Personal Info form fields
Frontend: Client Wizard Step 2 - Demographics dropdowns
Frontend: Client Wizard Step 3 - Services checkboxes with badges
Frontend: Client Wizard Step 4 - First Visit and Review Summary
Frontend: Client Wizard submit and redirect to client detail page
Frontend: Success toast 'Client onboarded successfully'
Frontend: Payments page with 3 tabs (Subscriptions, Payment Requests, History)
Frontend: Summary cards (Received, Pending, Overdue totals)
Frontend: 4 subscription packages (Basic $10, Standard $25, Premium $50, Enterprise $100)
Frontend: Send Payment Request dialog with form fields
Frontend: Payment Requests table with status badges and action buttons
Frontend: Payment History table with subscription transactions
Frontend: Admin Settings Demo Mode tab
Frontend: Load Demo Data button with credentials display
Frontend: Clear All Data button with confirm dialog
Frontend: Data cleared verification (0 total clients)
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/demo/seed - creates 12 clients, services, visits, outcomes, and 4-8 payment requests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features fully tested and working. Client Wizard creates clients with services and visits. Payment Requests system allows sending, tracking, and updating payment status. Demo Mode seeds mock payment data and Clear All Data removes all organization data. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing.
